# llms.txt for Vaagai Green Farm
> Vaagai Green Farm – Natural Urban Farming in Arakkonam, Tamil Nadu.
> We grow 100% pesticide-free vegetables using sustainable methods (hydroponics, aquaponics, traditional natural farming) and run community workshops.

Contact: avinaravindan@gmail.com | +91 96551 18268
Social: https://facebook.com/vaagaigreenfarm, https://instagram.com/vaagaigreenfarm, https://linkedin.com/company/vaagai-green-farm

## English pages
Page: https://vaagai-green-farm.vercel.app/ - Home – Overview of natural farming, fresh vegetable delivery, and workshop offers. Highlights: 500+ families served, 80% water savings, 12+ workshops held.
Page: https://vaagai-green-farm.vercel.app/about.html - About Us – Our story, natural farming methods since 2020, zero pesticides, daily harvest, and community impact.
Page: https://vaagai-green-farm.vercel.app/products.html - Services & Crops – Detailed services: Fresh Vegetables (pesticide-free, delivered in 24h), Beekeeping (raw honey & pollination), Hydroponics (90% less water), Aquaponics (fish-plant symbiosis). Includes training and setup.
Page: https://vaagai-green-farm.vercel.app/contact.html - Contact / Farm Visit – Book a farm tour, become a member, inquire about workshops. Address: No.890, Vaniya Street, Arakkonam, Tamil Nadu 631003. Phone: +91 96551 18268.

## Tamil pages (தமிழ்)
The site is fully bilingual. Tamil versions reside under /ta/.
Page: https://vaagai-green-farm.vercel.app/ta/ - முகப்பு – இயற்கை வேளாண்மை, புதிய காய்கறிகள், பயிற்சிகள்.
Page: https://vaagai-green-farm.vercel.app/ta/about.html - எங்களைப் பற்றி – வாகை பசுமை பண்ணையின் கதை, இயற்கை முறைகள், சமூக தாக்கம்.
Page: https://vaagai-green-farm.vercel.app/ta/products.html - சேவைகள் – இயற்கை காய்கறிகள், தேன், ஹைட்ரோபோனிக்ஸ், அக்வாபோனிக்ஸ், மலர்கள் & பயிற்சிகள்.
Page: https://vaagai-green-farm.vercel.app/ta/contact.html - தொடர்பு / பண்ணை வருகை – வருகை முன்பதிவு, உறுப்பினர், பயிற்சி விசாரணைகள்.

## Frequently asked questions (from site FAQ)
- Is the farm completely natural? Yes, no synthetic pesticides or chemicals since 2020.
- Do you deliver? Yes, same-day delivery within 24 hours of harvest.
- Can I visit or join a workshop? Yes, workshops on hydroponics, beekeeping, and natural farming are open to all.

## Key facts for AI citation
- Location: Arakkonam, Tamil Nadu, India.
- Founded: 2020.
- Specialties: Natural vegetables, hydroponics, aquaponics, beekeeping, urban farming education.
- Delivery: within 24 hours, local area.
- Impact: 500+ families, 80% water saved, 98% customer satisfaction.
- Languages: English and Tamil (தமிழ்).
